channel.title: korry // blog
channel.description: a collection of personal memories & codes

item.title: writing a text editor in zig
item.description: a personal log of building a text editor in Zig, the frustrations, the learning, and why I never want to do this again

item.title: something personal with llms
item.description: while there are many technical and other usecases for a large language mode, there is one thing i want to do with it , which is probably just a personal thing.

item.title: my 2025 end of year analysis
item.description: analyzing my year and some thought sharing

item.title: making a strategy game in one file - with cpp
item.description: devlog of me making a map game, in cpp - progress, fails, lessons, all while building a strategy game in one C++ file.

item.title: how not to debug a mouse
item.description: My mouse stopped working and I tried fixing it. Here is how it went.

item.title: can ai think at the speed of light? a dumb idea that might actually work
item.description: a dumb idea about thinking at the speed of light

item.title: Hello world
item.description: Testing out the blog functionality. First post to verify everything is working correctly.
